title: How Facebook's Algorithmic Tweaks Affected Engagement with News URLs over Time
snippet: Liveblog and media coverage of the ICA 2026 conference in Cape Town, detailing Fabio Giglietto's presentation on partisan alignment, journalistic quality, and algorithmic amplification on Facebook.
description: A liveblog post from the ICA 2026 conference detailing Fabio Giglietto's presentation on how Facebook's algorithmic tweaks affect partisan alignment and journalistic quality.

title: Panel – Meta Content Library Community Roundtable: Where to for Social Media Research? – #SMSociety 2026
snippet: Event announcement and panel program for the International Conference on Social Media & Society listing Professor Fabio Giglietto as an expert speaker. The roundtable panel discusses future methodologies for academic research following Meta's shutdown of CrowdTangle.
description: An announcement for the #SMSociety conference panel featuring Professor Fabio Giglietto as an expert speaker discussing the Meta Content Library and the future of social media research.

title: socialmediaandsociety.org
description: An announcement for the International Conference on Social Media & Society listing Professor Fabio Giglietto as an expert panelist discussing future pathways for social media research following the closure of CrowdTangle.

title: Indagine urbinate: "Così l’algoritmo influenza il voto" - Il Resto del Carlino
description: News article from Il Resto del Carlino

title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: Press coverage summarizing the political and institutional impact of Professor Giglietto's research. The article highlights how the study served as the basis for a formal inquiry submitted to the European Parliament, questioning Meta's compliance with risk-mitigation obligations under the Digital Services Act (DSA).
description: Press coverage from Vivere Urbino analyzing the political and institutional impact of Professor Giglietto's research on Meta's algorithms and DSA compliance.

title: La schedatura dei docenti, l’antifascismo e il tarlo della scuola del ’68 - Centro Studi Sereno Regis
description: News article from Centro Studi Sereno Regis

title: L'articolo 21 nella gabbia di Facebook
snippet: A deep-dive journalistic analysis commenting on Fabio Giglietto's research into Facebook's content-filtering policies. It discusses the broader constitutional implications of big-tech algorithmic governance on freedom of expression (Article 21 of the Italian Constitution) and public interest information.
description: An opinion piece analyzing digital free speech in Italy that heavily cites Fabio Giglietto's research on the impacts of Facebook's political content reduction policy.

title: Facebook, troppa visibilità a estremisti e complottisti: ecco come impatta Meta sulle elezioni
snippet: Media coverage of the research conducted by Giglietto at the University of Urbino. The article summarizes how Meta's recommendation algorithms systematically penalized official political communication, leaving room for conspiracy theories and extremist content to lead the narrative.
description: An article covering Professor Fabio Giglietto's research analyzing over 2.5 million Facebook posts, focusing on how political extremist pages bypassed Meta's filters to gain visibility during elections.

title: Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino - Lumsanews
